name: Chick Peas and Sesame Paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Chickpeas should be overcooked. Reserve the liquid.
2. Combine chick peas with 1/2 cup of reserved liquid in a blender.
3. Mash well.
4. Add other ingredients except sesame paste, paprika, and additional parsley to the blender.
5. In a small bowl, mix the sesame paste with a little more of the reserved stock.
6. Stir this mixture into the blender briefly.
7. Serve sprinkled with paprika and additional parsley, alongside pita bread.
